title: Cynoglossospermum tenue
intro: Cynoglossum tenue, commonly known as slender hound's-tongue or narrow tongue-hound's-tongue, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, offering potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in treating various ailments including infections and skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of Cynoglossum tenue include alkaloids, flavonoids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, Cynoglossum tenue is often prepared as a decoction or infusions, and it can also be found in various traditional herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and topical creams.
